mission.title: metallb: Support endpoint slices
mission.description:
Endpoint slices are a more scalable way to distribute service endpoints.

Here we check if they are enabled on the cluster, and we set up the
listeners and the logic to use them, otherwise we fallback to use
endpoints.

Fixes #811

resolution.summary:
> Thanks for the PR! How did you test this? Did you try it in the metallb kind-based dev env? I see the unit test cases you added, so thank you for that!

This is one of the things I wanted feedback on. I deployed a kind + ovnk cluster (where I knew ep slices were enabled), deployed there and checked that the events were propagated up to the listeners (with extra logs, now removed).
Once there, the other segment of the path is covered by the unit tests. Not sure if there's a better way to do that.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
